task_completion.description: Agent navigated RockAuto to find vehicle parts
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Firefox open to rockauto.com with the catalog expanded for the 2019 Ford F-150, 2020 Toyota RAV4 Hybrid, or 2018 Honda Civic.

task_completion.description: Created a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Fleet Parts'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmarks menu, sidebar, or toolbar showing a folder explicitly named 'Fleet Parts'.

task_completion.description: Saved direct links to RockAuto catalog pages for the three vehicles in the bookmark folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the 'Fleet Parts' bookmark folder showing saved links/bookmarks corresponding to the RockAuto pages for the three specified vehicles.

task_completion.description: Created fleet_specs.json with the correct vehicle keys
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file ~/Documents/fleet_specs.json containing the top-level JSON keys 'ford_f150', 'toyota_rav4', and 'honda_civic'.

task_completion.description: JSON file contains oil viscosity and capacity for each vehicle
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of fleet_specs.json showing values for engine oil viscosity and engine oil capacity in quarts (with filter) for all three vehicles.

task_completion.description: JSON file contains WIX brand part numbers for oil and cabin air filters
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of fleet_specs.json showing WIX brand part numbers for both the oil filter and cabin air filter for all three vehicles.

integrity.description: Agent used the Firefox GUI to search RockAuto and create bookmarks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Firefox browser interface being used to navigate and bookmark pages, rather than terminal commands like curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: Agent collected actual data from the web
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON file contains specific part numbers, viscosities, and capacities, not generic placeholders or text copied directly from the prompt.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with a text editor or IDE to create the JSON file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like VS Code, gedit, nano, or vim) being used to format and save the JSON file.
